summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 + Phase 4 + AWS integration (Cognito, S3, Vapi webhook, Gemini scoring, scheduling). Backend: 95% pass rate (20/21 tests). Frontend: All critical UI elements verified including AWS badges, auth flows, and dashboard credits.

minor_bugs.issue: The _scrub function removes _id from syllabus documents but doesn't add it back as 'id', making it impossible to retrieve the syllabus ID for download endpoint
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot test syllabus download presigned URL endpoint
minor_bugs.workaround: The upload endpoint could return the syllabus ID, or _scrub should preserve id field

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health shows aws.using_cognito=true and aws.using_s3=true
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/demo returns local JWT with auth_source='local-demo'
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/signup creates Cognito user with unique email and returns ID token + refresh token
BACKEND: Duplicate Cognito signup returns 409
BACKEND: Weak password (e.g. 'short') returns 422 validation error
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login works with Cognito credentials and returns ID token
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login with bad password returns 401
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me validates Cognito ID token via JWKS and returns user info
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me with garbage token returns 401
BACKEND: PUT /api/auth/me updates name and phone successfully
BACKEND: POST /api/syllabi/upload stores PDF to S3 (bucket: gryph-os, key prefix: syllabi/<user_id>/) and extracts events
BACKEND: GET /api/syllabi lists uploaded syllabi with s3_key field
BACKEND: POST /api/quiz/generate stores file to S3 under materials/<user_id>/ and generates questions
BACKEND: POST /api/schedule with valid future ISO timestamp returns ScheduledCall with status='scheduled'
BACKEND: POST /api/schedule with past timestamp returns 400
BACKEND: GET /api/schedule lists scheduled calls
BACKEND: DELETE /api/schedule/{id} cancels scheduled call
BACKEND: POST /api/calls/{session_id}/score returns 404 for non-existent session (guards against missing transcript)
BACKEND: POST /api/webhooks/vapi accepts synthetic end-of-call-report payload without auth and returns {ok:true}
BACKEND: POST /api/webhooks/vapi handles missing fields gracefully without crash
FRONTEND: Auth page shows 'Auth secured by AWS Cognito' badge
FRONTEND: Demo bypass works and sidebar shows 'Demo session' indicator
FRONTEND: Dashboard footer shows 'Powered by AWS Cognito · AWS S3 · Gemini 2.5 Pro · Vapi.ai'
FRONTEND: Cognito signup flow works end-to-end and sidebar shows 'AWS Cognito' indicator
FRONTEND: Call Center page accessible with 'Call now' and 'Schedule' tabs
FRONTEND: Schedule tab shows datetime input, note input, and submit button
